user.title: Light Companion
user.description: Light Companion uses any supported Home Assistant conversation agent (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Ollama) for LLM access.

abort.missing_llm: No supported conversation agent integration was found. Set up at least one (OpenAI Conversation, Anthropic, Google Generative AI, or Ollama) under Settings > Devices & Services, then retry Light Companion.
abort.missing_openai: No supported conversation agent integration was found.
